name: Chocolate Rum Dums
recipeIngredient: 8 1/2 oz. chocolate wafers, crushed (about 2 packed cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crushed chocolate wafer, pecans, sugar, corn syrup, and dark rum in a large bowl. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
2. Shape the mixture into small round balls using teaspoons full of the mixture. Place the balls on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
3. Let the dumplings stand at room temperature for 10 minutes to set slightly.
4. Roll each ball in additional granulated sugar, coating it completely.
5. Allow the sugared dumplings to cool before serving.
